creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Enji Cooper from comment #0)

Hi Enji,

Welcome back to the project :)

We have a procedure for situations like this, the step-by-step guide is in the committer's guide: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/article.html#bugzilla

Also your @FreeBSD.org password is controlled by the cluster's Kerberos system. The link in step #3 explains how to reset it.
